Top module

top_mosbius_devices_v1_nmos

Modules

top_mosbius_devices_v1_nmos

Overview

MOSbius V1 NMOS device bank
All devices are exposed to chip pads directly.

Expression

Axis

Description

cm_size

<1|2|4|8|16>

cm_size

Endpoints

$NMOS_CM_ARRAY_IOUT_<@cm_size>X

nmos_cm_array.iout_<@cm_size>x

$NMOS_CM_ARRAY_IREF

nmos_cm_array.iref, nmos_ota.vbn

nmos_ota.<inp|inn|out>

$NMOS_CM_<IREF|IOUT>

$INV_16X_A_<INN|OUT|INP>

inv.<inn|out|inp>

$VDD

nmos_ota.vdd, inv.vdd, mp_dummy.<d|g|s|b>

$VSS

nmos_ota.vss, inv.vss, nmos_cm_array.vss, nmos_cm.vss, mn_dp_1x_<a|b>.b, mn_dp_4x_<a|b>.b, mn_cs_4x_<a|b>.<s|b>, mn_dummy.<d|g|s|b>
